     The Numbers Business Report

Abigail (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,867,515Details
International Box Office $17,174,055
Worldwide Box Office $43,041,570
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $941,793
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,271,343
Total $2,213,136
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a group of would-be criminals kidnap the 12-year-old ballerina daughter of a powerful underworld figure, all they have to do to collect a $50 million ransom is watch the girl overnight. In an isolated mansion, the captors start to dwindle, one by one, and they discover, to their mounting horror, that they’re locked inside with no normal little girl.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,297,110 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,384 opening theaters/3,393 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,354,159

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 19th, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: April 17th, 2024 (Wide) (Iceland)
April 17th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
April 17th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Ecuador)
April 18th, 2024 (Wide), released as Abigail (ЭБИГЕЙЛ) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: May 7th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R strong bloody violence and gore throughout, pervasive language and brief drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2821 (cert #54856), 2/14/2024)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Filming location (country): Ireland
Plot point: Kidnap, Ransom, Surprise Twist, Vampire
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Project X Entertainment, Vinson Films, Radio Silence
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After a group of would-be criminals kidnap the 12-year-old ballerina daughter of a powerful underworld figure, all they have to do to collect a $50 million ransom is watch the girl overnight. In an isolated mansion, the captors start to dwindle, one by one, and they discover, to their mounting horror, that they’re locked inside with no normal little girl.
